name: 网页内容智能视频生成器

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "kling-video/v1/standard/image_to_video",
  "prompt": "Transform this image into a smooth 5-second video with {{ $json.camera_movement || 'steady motion' }}",
  "image_url": "data:image/jpeg;base64,{{ $binary.data.toString('base64') }}",
  "duration": 5,
  "aspect_ratio": "16:9",
  "cfg_scale": 0.5,
  "mode": "std"
}
